title: Auto Respawn
description: The AutoRespawn Mod respawns displays the death screen for a short delay before respawning automatically
body:
<center>

[**![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fd2f0f5-1266-429b-b91c-d015a2026f31.webp)**](https://blocklegend001.dev/bh)

**[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)**

The AutoRespawn Mod displays the death screen for a short delay before respawning automatically. It removes the need to manually click the respawn button, ensuring a seamless gameplay experience. The mod is client-side and works even on vanilla servers without requiring server-side installation.

**ShowCase**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NcFUID0kUeU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
